description: Mapping of PDPA 2010 (Act 709) sections to subsidiary legislation (regulations, orders, and rules) made under the Act

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: The Regulations supplement the Act's definitions by providing further specificity on what constitutes adequate security measures, retention periods, and processing conditions referenced in the Act.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Class of Data Controllers) Order 2013
regulations.notes: Defines the 13 classes of data controllers required to register with the Commissioner. The definitions in s2 of the Act must be read alongside the class descriptions in this Order.

mappings.sectionTitle: Application of Personal Data Protection Principles

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: The Regulations provide substantive content for the application of the principles, including conditions for processing, security measures, and retention schedules.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Compounding of Offences) Regulations 2016
regulations.notes: Section 5(3) offences (contravention of principles) are compoundable under these regulations.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: Regulation 4 sets out the conditions for lawful processing corresponding to s6(2), providing additional guidance on each lawful basis.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: Regulation 5 specifies the form and content requirements for data protection notices, including the requirement for bilingual (Bahasa Malaysia and English) notices.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Standard (Security of Personal Data — Electronic) 2015
regulations.notes: Sets out the minimum technical and organizational security measures required for personal data processed electronically, implementing s9 of the Act.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Standard (Security of Personal Data — Non-Electronic) 2015
regulations.notes: Sets out the minimum physical and organizational security measures required for personal data processed in non-electronic (paper-based) form.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Standard (Retention of Personal Data) 2015
regulations.notes: Specifies the maximum retention periods for various categories of personal data and the procedures for secure deletion and destruction at the end of the retention period.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Standard (Integrity of Personal Data) 2015
regulations.notes: Specifies the procedures and controls required to maintain the accuracy, completeness, and currency of personal data, implementing s11 of the Act.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Registration of Data Controller) Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: The primary subsidiary legislation governing the registration process. Sets out the application procedure, required information, and conditions for registration.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Class of Data Controllers) Order 2013
regulations.notes: Identifies the 13 classes of data controllers required to register under s13. Only data controllers in these classes are subject to the registration requirement.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Fees) Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: Sets out the fees payable on registration, renewal of registration, and related matters.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Registration of Data Controller) Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: Prescribes the form of the application, documents to be submitted, and the procedure for processing applications.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Fees) Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: Sets the registration application fee.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Registration of Data Controller) Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: Sets out the form of the certificate of registration, its validity period, and the conditions for renewal.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Fees) Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: Sets the renewal fee.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Registration of Data Controller) Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: Sets out the procedure for revocation and suspension of registration, including notice requirements and the opportunity to be heard.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2013
regulations.notes: The Regulations supplement s129 by specifying the countries approved for data transfer and the conditions for each mechanism.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Compounding of Offences) Regulations 2016
regulations.notes: Offences under s12B are compoundable under these regulations, providing a mechanism for out-of-court settlement for less serious breach notification failures.

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection (Compounding of Offences) Regulations 2016
regulations.notes: The Schedule to the Compounding Regulations lists all compoundable offences. General penalty offences under s136 are included where the underlying breach is compoundable.

mappings.sectionTitle: Power to Issue Code of Practice

regulations.title: Personal Data Protection Code of Practice (General) 2022
regulations.notes: Issued pursuant to the Commissioner's power under s57. Compliance with the Code is mandatory for all data controllers.
